name: inquiry_response
subject: Re: Your Inquiry – {{company_name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient_name}},

Thank you for reaching out to {{company_name}}. We appreciate your interest and are glad to provide the information you need.

{{offer_details}}

If you would like to move forward or have further questions, please don't hesitate to contact us. We are happy to schedule a call or meeting at your convenience.

Warm regards,
{{sender_name}}
{{company_name}}
